chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 178 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.751/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 17.12.2025 Mr. Abdul Hafeez, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
